Welcome to the Course 8 simulation. So for this scenario, you and your new spouse are trying to buy a home. As far as you're aware, you're the only ones to put in a bid for this property and it's been on the market for about three months. The sellers have already come down $10,000 from their original listing price. The listing price on the house is $176,000 and the total closing costs are estimated to be $8,000. After doing some research on comparable homes, you determine that your target price is $167,000 with half of the closing costs paid for you. Your goal is to get your demands and not have the contract fall through. You're in the process of submitting the contract to the seller. How much do you put down as your asking price?
